business_ideas.idea: Jenny AI: AI writing assistant for college students with plagiarism checking and citation
Hostage Tape: mouth tape for breathing optimization marketed to health-conscious consumers
Flo: women's health super-app expanding beyond period tracking to health coaching and AI

predictions.text: AI writing assistants will face commoditization risk as ChatGPT integrates student use cases.
Wellness habit businesses (mouth taping) will continue growing as biohacking trends accelerate.
Flo could reach 2-3B valuation as women's health market consolidation continues globally.
